diagnostics.message: Separator Liquid 92 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Booster Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.
Product Separator is configured for fixed pressure mode but the operating pressure target is missing.
Booster Pump efficiency_percent=109 is outside the recommended operating range.
Separator Liquid 92 routing still depends on the current pump discharge condition and separator pressure context.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

{"schema_version":1,"project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-cross-object-mixed-risk-reconnect-pump-update-plus-separator-placeholder-001","locale":"zh-CN","status":"partial","summary":"针对 Booster Pump (pump-13) 出口压力目标配置错误、效率参数超范围，以及 Product Separator (separator-10) 固定压力模式缺少操作压力目标的问题，生成候选编辑提案。同时注意到 Separator Liquid 92 流股未连接下游，但当前证据不足以生成安全的拓扑重连方案，故仅对泵和分离器的参数配置提出局部修正。","answers":[{"text":"已识别三个关键问题：泵出口压力目标低于入口压力（需修正）、泵效率超范围（需调整）、分离器固定压力模式缺少压力设定（需补全）。Separator Liquid 92 的下游连接问题因缺乏目标单元信息，建议用户手动完成拓扑重连。"}],"issues":[{"code":"PUMP_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_INVALID","message":"Booster Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.","severity":"error","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-1"]},{"code":"UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE","message":"Booster Pump efficiency_percent=109 is outside the recommended operating range.","severity":"warning","citations":["diag-4","flowdoc-unit-1"]},{"code":"UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE","message":"Product Separator is configured for fixed pressure mode but the operating pressure target is missing.","severity":"error","citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-2"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"修正 Booster Pump 出口压力目标至合理增压范围","target":{"kind":"unit","id":"pump-13","name":"Booster Pump"},"rationale":"当前出口压力目标 150 kPa 低于入口压力 200 kPa，违反泵的基本工作原理。参考泵出口流股 pump-outlet-92 的实际压力 158 kPa，建议将目标压力设定为 250 kPa 以实现有效增压，同时保留后续调优空间。","patch":{"parameter_updates":{"outlet_pressure_target_kpa":250}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"confidence":0.85,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-1","flowdoc-stream-2","snapshot-1"]},{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"调整 Booster Pump 效率至合理范围","target":{"kind":"unit","id":"pump-13","name":"Booster Pump"},"rationale":"当前效率 109% 超出物理可行范围（通常离心泵效率 60-85%）。建议暂设为 75% 作为典型工作点，待实际性能曲线数据可用后进一步校准。","patch":{"parameter_updates":{"efficiency_percent":75}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"confidence":0.9,"citations":["diag-4","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]},{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"为 Product Separator 补全固定压力操作目标","target":{"kind":"unit","id":"separator-10","name":"Product Separator"},"rationale":"分离器配置为 fixed 压力模式但缺少压力设定值。参考入口流股 pump-outlet-92 压力 158 kPa 及出口液相流股压力 146 kPa，建议设定操作压力为 140 kPa 以匹配下游条件并保留适当压降。","patch":{"parameter_updates":{"pressure_target_kpa":140}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"confidence":0.8,"citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-2","flowdoc-stream-2","flowdoc-stream-3","snapshot-1"]}],"citations":[{"id":"diag-2","type":"diagnostic","description":"PUMP_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_INVALID error on pump-13"},{"id":"diag-3","type":"diagnostic","description":"UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE error on separator-10"},{"id":"diag-4","type":"diagnostic","description":"UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE warning on pump-13"},{"id":"flowdoc-unit-1","type":"artifact","description":"Booster Pump unit configuration in flowsheet_document"},{"id":"flowdoc-unit-2","type":"artifact","description":"Product Separator unit configuration in flowsheet_document"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-2","type":"artifact","description":"Pump Outlet 92 stream specs"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-3","type":"artifact","description":"Separator Liquid 92 stream specs"},{"id":"snapshot-1","type":"snapshot","description":"Latest solver status showing invalid_topology"}],"requires_confirmation":true}

response.summary: 针对 Booster Pump (pump-13) 出口压力目标配置错误、效率参数超范围，以及 Product Separator (separator-10) 固定压力模式缺少操作压力目标的问题，生成候选编辑提案。同时注意到 Separator Liquid 92 流股未连接下游，但当前证据不足以生成安全的拓扑重连方案，故仅对泵和分离器的参数配置提出局部修正。

answers.text: 已识别三个关键问题：泵出口压力目标低于入口压力（需修正）、泵效率超范围（需调整）、分离器固定压力模式缺少压力设定（需补全）。Separator Liquid 92 的下游连接问题因缺乏目标单元信息，建议用户手动完成拓扑重连。

issues.message: Separator Liquid 92 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Booster Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.
Product Separator is configured for fixed pressure mode but the operating pressure target is missing.
Booster Pump efficiency_percent=109 is outside the recommended operating range.
Separator Liquid 92 routing still depends on the current pump discharge condition and separator pressure context.

proposed_actions.title: 为 separator-liquid-92 预留下游重连占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前断链问题只能通过人工确认后续去向来处理，因此 patch 仅保留候选连接占位。

proposed_actions.title: 为 pump-13 补充局部参数占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断集中在局部参数或配置完整性，因此更合适的是输出可审查的局部参数占位提案。

proposed_actions.title: 为 separator-10 补充局部参数占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断集中在局部参数或配置完整性，因此更合适的是输出可审查的局部参数占位提案。
